title: lasiorrhiza seneciodes
intro: Lasiorrhiza seneciodes, also known as Chinese Senecio, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving symptoms of the common cold, as well as acting as an expectorant to help clear mucus from the respiratory system. In herbal preparations, Lasiorrhiza seneciodes is typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or added to other herbal remedies to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
